name: The Spotlight Book Club - In the Days of My Youth I Was Told What It Means to Be a Man
description: ★ Rating: 7/10 In the Days of My Youth I Was Told What It Means to Be a Man announces itself as a reckoning. Tom Junod, the longtime Esquire writer and cultural observer, turns inward to examine his father Lou—a charismatic, philandering showroom operator who…
